hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.json) prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "✓ Formatted: $(basename $f)";; *.py) black "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "✓ Formatted: $(basename $f)";; esac || true
